response.original_title: John Wayne Behind-the-Scenes: Filming of Stunts, Chases, Fights, Crashes & Gun Battles
response.overview: John Wayne Behind-the-Scenes: Filming of Stunts, Chases, Fights, Crashes & Gun Battles is a 2017 documentary that compiles rare footage, TV clips, and promos showcasing the action sequences from his films, including Stagecoach, The War Wagon, McLintock!, and The Green Berets.
response.title: John Wayne Behind-the-Scenes: Filming of Stunts, Chases, Fights, Crashes & Gun Battles
